name: python3-serial-asyncio
title: python3-serial-asyncio
summary: Async I/O extension package for pyserial
description:
Async I/O extension package for pyserial
Async I/O extension package for the Python Serial Port Extension for
OSX, Linux, BSD. It depends on pySerial and is compatible with
Python 3.5 and later.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-serial-asyncio because Async I/O extension package for pyserial.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-serial-asyncio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-serial-asyncio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-serial-asyncio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
